mapper.select: select p.sign_at, p.delivery_cycle , p.title,p.sow,p.bonus,b1.brand_name supplierName,b1.avator supplierAvatar, p.tag,p.id commissionId,p.oasis_id,o.handle as oasisHandle from commission p inner join oasis o on p.oasis_id=o.id left join brand b1 on b1.id=p.worker where p.id=#{id}

select c.id, o.avatar as oasisAvatar, fd.drawable as oasisBalance, o.membership as oasisMembers, o.title as oasisName, c.sow, c.title, c.bonus, c.create_at as createAt, c.delivery_cycle as deliveryCycle from commission c inner join oasis o on c.oasis_id = o.id inner join fin_account fd on o.id = fd.fid and fd.fid_type = '2' where c.tag in ('6', '7')
and (locate(#{dto.q}, c.title) > 0 or locate(#{dto.q}, o.title) > 0)
order by c.modified_at desc
